name: PraisonAI
tagline: Build autonomous multi-agent AI teams in a few lines of Python or JavaScript
metaDescription: PraisonAI is an open-source Python and JavaScript framework for building autonomous AI agents and multi-agent teams with memory, RAG, and MCP tools over 100+ LLMs.
overview: PraisonAI is an open-source framework for building AI agents that research, plan, and run tasks on their own. You can start with a single agent in a few lines of code, then scale up to a full team of agents that hand work off to each other.

It runs on more than 100 LLMs, including OpenAI, Anthropic, Google Gemini, and local models through Ollama, so you are not locked into one provider. Built-in memory, RAG, guardrails, and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tool support come ready to use.
PraisonAI ships as a Python SDK and a JavaScript SDK, plus a CLI, a visual flow builder, and chat and dashboard interfaces. You add only the pieces you need as your project grows.
features: Single-agent and multi-agent setups: give one agent a goal, or chain several agents that pass tasks between each other
Works with 100+ LLMs out of the box, including OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, Groq, Mistral, and local Ollama models
Built-in memory that works with zero extra dependencies, plus RAG for knowledge-backed answers
Model Context Protocol (MCP) support over stdio, HTTP, WebSocket, and SSE to connect external tools
Planning mode, self-reflection, agent handoffs, and guardrails for input and output validation
Multiple ways to use it: Python SDK, JavaScript SDK, CLI, visual Flow builder, and chat UI

gettingStarted.intro: PraisonAI has a lightweight core SDK you can install with pip. Set your LLM API key, then create your first agent in a couple of lines. There is also a JavaScript SDK and a one-line installer.

steps.heading: Install the core SDK
steps.body: Install the lightweight agents package and set your model provider key.

steps.heading: Run your first agent
steps.body: Give an agent instructions and a task, then let it work.
steps.code:
from praisonaiagents import Agent

agent = Agent(instructions="You are a senior data analyst.")
agent.start("Analyze the top 3 tech trends of 2026 and format as a markdown table.")

steps.heading: Build a multi-agent team
steps.body: Create several agents and run them together so one passes its findings to the next.
steps.code:
from praisonaiagents import Agent, Agents

research_agent = Agent(instructions="Research about AI")
summarise_agent = Agent(instructions="Summarise research agent's findings")
agents = Agents(agents=[research_agent, summarise_agent])
agents.start()

steps.heading: Use the JavaScript SDK
steps.body: Prefer Node? Install the JavaScript package instead.

useCases: Run deep research that gathers information from multiple sources and turns it into structured insights
Automate multi-step business workflows where agents hand off tasks, verify results, and self-correct
Generate and refactor code with agents that understand your requirements
Deploy 24/7 customer support bots on Telegram, Discord, or Slack with memory and knowledge-backed answers
Build data pipelines that extract, transform, and analyze data from APIs, databases, and web sources
